reviews.comment:
Sitio amplio, agradable, con todo lo que busques para desayunar merendar. solo recomendaría que apaguen los aires los días fríos. Baños excelentes en mantenimiento y limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Spacious and pleasant place, with everything you could need for breakfast or a snack. I would only recommend turning off the air conditioning on cold days. The restrooms are excellent in terms of maintenance and cleanliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNdDlyTFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre! Fuimos a la parrilla, nos sentamos, la camarera no sabía qué es un provoleta... Pedimos un par de chorizos y tuvimos que levantarnos a buscarlos!  Un desastre la atención y la comida... Para seguir de largo!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! We went to the grill, sat down, and the waitress didn't even know what provoleta was... We ordered a couple of chorizos and had to get up to get them! The service and the food were awful... We'll just keep walking!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbC1mZ3VBRRAB
